headline: Week’s Best: Hardship Retirement Withdrawals on the Rise
summary: Other top reasons were to pay medical bills, tuition expenses, and home repairs.  At the same time, a bull market for stocks over the past four years has boosted balances in retirement accounts.  For independent wealth management firms, growth through acquisitions is a great way to add advisor talent.
